name: school-work-portal
description: Local tooling for linting and testing the school work portal

scripts.check:syntax: node --check assets/js/index.js && node --check assets/js/report-word-generator.js && node --check assets/js/ai-assistant.js && node --check assets/js/register.js && node --check assets/js/visitor-counter.js && node --check assets/js/admin-unanswered.js && node --check assets/js/admin-schools.js && node --check src/chat-security.mjs && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check tests/assistant-security.test.mjs && node --check tests/assistant-legacy-cleanup.test.mjs && node --check tests/admin-unanswered.test.mjs && node --check tests/admin-schools.test.mjs && node --check tests/vectorize-lifecycle.test.mjs && node --check tests/version-consistency.test.mjs && node --check tools/check-links.js && node --check tools/check-knowledge.js && node --check tools/ingest-knowledge.js && node --check tools/vectorize-lifecycle.js && node --check tools/update-knowledge-stats.js && node --check local-server.cjs
scripts.lint:js: eslint assets/js src tools tests local-server.cjs playwright.config.cjs eslint.config.cjs
scripts.qa: npm run check:syntax && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html && npm run check:links && npm run check:knowledge && npm run test:assistant-security && npm run test:assistant-legacy-cleanup && npm run test:admin-unanswered && npm run test:admin-schools && npm run test:vectorize-lifecycle && npm run test:version-consistency && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
